name: debug-strike-team
description: Root-cause and recovery squad for regressions, flaky behavior, or high-uncertainty incidents.

overlay.promptSuffix: Own reproduction, evidence gathering, trace collection, and narrowing of failure conditions. Prioritize root cause over patch speculation.
Own fault isolation strategy, rollback/risk assessment, and the shape of the smallest safe fix for cross-cutting issues.
Implement only after repro and containment plan are clear. Prefer the smallest safe fix with explicit regression guards.
Verify the fix, guard against recurrence, and document repro plus verification evidence before closure.

bootContext.teamDescription: Incident/debugging team for failures that need evidence, technical judgment, and disciplined validation.
bootContext.initialObjective: Reproduce first, isolate root cause, define the safest fix/rollback path, and close only after regression protection is verified.
sharedContext: No speculative fixes. Reproduce first and preserve evidence.
Architect and researcher narrow the problem before builder changes code.
Every incident task should capture current behavior, expected behavior, likely blast radius, and verification steps.
QA owns regression confidence before the team declares recovery complete.
commandChain: user -> master -> researcher/architect -> builder -> qa-engineer -> master -> user
